title: Yenadi Nee Song Lyrics Adhagappattathu Magajanangalay
stanzas:
yenadi nee enna ippadi aakkuna
kaathala sattunnu kannula kaattuna
modhamum kaiyila vanthathu pola
megathu mela naan vaikkiraen kaala
vaerathum thonala adiye
aanandham thaangala

yenadi nee enna ippadi aakkuna
kaathala sattunnu kannula kaattuna

mettil isaignani endrum azhagaaga
seikindra maayam pola
ennil pala nooru inbam thara neeyum
vanthaaye koodi vaazha
nidhamum koyil sendru
varum baktharakal seivathu yaagam

athanai paerum yaenga varam
ennaidam vanthathu yogam
pothum ithu pothum
unathuanbakku eedillai yaethum
yaenadi nee enna ippadi aakkuna
kaathala sattunnu kannula kaattuna

thannanthani veedu selvam pathinaaru
vanthaalum thevai neeye
annai madi vaasam unnil thinam veesa
kondaene kaathal noyae
ethanai kodi jenmam
uyire vanthathu unaiyum thedi
oppanai yaethum illa unnai
vittengu sendridum odi
naadi unnai koodi
varum inbathil kooraene aadi

yenadi nee enna ippadi aakkuna
kaathala sattunnu kannula kaattuna
modhamum kaiyila vanthathu pola
megathu mela naan vaikkiraen kaala
vaerathum thonala adiye
aanandham thaangala

yenadi nee enna ippadi aakkuna
kaathala sattunnu kannula kaattuna

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yenadi Nee'?

The song 'Yenadi Nee' expresses deep romantic feelings and the joy of love, showcasing the beauty of a relationship.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Adhagappattathu Magajanangalay, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional narrative of the film.

Who are the singers of 'Yenadi Nee'?

The song features the talented voices of Karthik and Shreya Goshal, known for their melodious renditions.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Yenadi Nee' was composed by D Imman, who is celebrated for his engaging melodies in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Yenadi Nee' released?

'Yenadi Nee' was released on October 7, 2016, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Yenadi Nee' from Adhagappattathu Magajanangalay is a romantic duet that beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and affection. Sung by Karthik and Shreya Goshal, it conveys a sense of joy and connection between the characters. The lyrics reflect the blissful moments shared in a relationship, making it a perfect fit for celebrations of love. With D Imman's enchanting composition, the song resonates with listeners, evoking feelings of happiness and nostalgia.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yenadi Nee from the movie Adhagappattathu Magajanangalay is a captivating duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Karthik and Shreya Goshal, this song is a melodic journey that resonates with love and joy. D Imman's masterful composition elevates the emotional depth, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Why are you making me feel this way? It seems like love is showing in your eyes, and I feel like I'm placing clouds in my hands. I can't bear this happiness anymore.
I can't bear this happiness anymore.
Why are you making me feel this way? It seems like love is showing in your eyes.
Like a magician who always creates beauty, you bring me countless joys. Together, we will live happily, and the devotees will come to the temple to perform their rituals.
Everyone is coming to me for blessings. This is enough for you. Why are you making me feel this way? It seems like love is showing in your eyes.

Even if wealth comes to the house, you are the one I need. I have been living with you every day. How many lives have come searching for you? There is nothing that can replace you. Even if I leave, I will run back to you in joy.
Why are you making me feel this way? It seems like love is showing in your eyes, and I feel like I'm placing clouds in my hands. I can't bear this happiness anymore.
I can't bear this happiness anymore.
Why are you making me feel this way? It seems like love is showing in your eyes.
